company_context: Attention Required! | Cloudflare Please enable cookies. Sorry, you have been blocked You are unable to access springboard.com Why have I been blocked? This website is using a security service to protect itself from online attacks. The action you just performed triggered the security solution. There are several actions that could trigger this block including submitting a certain word or phrase, a SQL command or malformed data. What can I do to resolve this? You can email the site owner to let them know you were blocked. Please include what you were doing when this page came up and the Cloudflare Ray ID found at the bottom of this page. Cloudflare Ray ID: 9d7fc91c7e494fd4 • Your IP: Click to reveal 103.160.233.193 • Performance & security by Cloudflare

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their data operations and gain valuable insights. I came across your company, Springboard, and noticed you're experiencing some issues with online security and access. I'd love to explore how our solution can help.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We've been having some issues with Cloudflare blocking our access to certain websites. But I'm not sure how a data processing solution like DeepData AI can help with that. We already have a solution in place for data processing, and it's working fine for us.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that you have a existing solution, but I'd like to highlight that DeepData AI can help you integrate your security and data processing operations more seamlessly. Our AI-powered engine can help you identify and mitigate potential security threats more efficiently. Plus, our pricing is very competitive, with plans starting at $5,000 per month.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but $5,000 per month is a bit steep for us. We're a budget-conscious company, and our current solution is costing us significantly less than that. Moreover, I'm not sure if our team has the bandwidth to implement a new solution right now. We're in the middle of a major product launch, and I don't want to distract them with a new integration.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns about budget and timing. However, I'd like to emphasize that DeepData AI can help you save costs in the long run by reducing the need for manual data processing and minimizing security breaches. We also offer a phased implementation approach that can be tailored to your team's availability. Additionally, we have a proven track record of successful integrations with companies similar to yours.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate your persistence, but I'm afraid we're not in the market for a new data processing solution right now. We're happy with our current provider, and they've been doing a good job for us. I don't see a compelling reason to switch to DeepData AI, especially given the costs and implementation efforts involved.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your decision, and I respect your loyalty to your current provider. If you're open to it, I'd like to send you some case studies and whitepapers that demonstrate the benefits of DeepData AI. Maybe in the future, you'll reconsider our solution.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Thank you for your understanding, Alex. I appreciate the offer, but I think we'll have to pass on DeepData AI for now. We're all set with our current solution, and I don't foresee us making any changes in the near future. Please don't contact us again regarding this matter.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have more effectively addressed the buyer's budget concerns and explored potential cost savings or flexible pricing options to mitigate the price objection. Sentiment: Neutral
